commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
It is well, occurs only once in Hebrew, which may be imperfect, as many versions supply the second. (Berthier)
Mind, as we could have desired. Protestants, "Oh, (marginal note adds ah) so would we have it. "(Haydock)
Things go on well according to our mind. (Menochius)
